item.title: DSC
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.excerpt:encoded: {"prompt":"Imagine a sleek, modern digital workspace illuminated by soft blue and green lighting, where a professional is sitting at a sophisticated desk filled with high-tech gadgets. In front of them, a large digital screen displays a vivid interface for creating digital signatures, featuring intricate designs such as elegant cursive fonts and geometric shapes. The overall mood is one of productivity and innovation, while the backdrop showcases a city skyline through panoramic windows, adding an urban aesthetic to the scene. The use of minimalist decor and metallic accents enhances the contemporary feel, highlighting the importance of technology in today's signature processes.nnDigital Signatures","originalPrompt":"Digital Signatures","width":1024,"height":576,"seed":43,"model":"flux","nologo":true,"negative_prompt":"worst quality, blurry","nofeed":true,"safe":false,"isMature":false,"isChild":false}

item.title: Retired employees
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.excerpt:encoded: {"prompt":"Visualize a contemporary setting that embodies the essence of an Indian household, portraying a young professional, a middle-aged employee, and an elderly family member gathered in a bright living room. The atmosphere exudes warmth and familiarity, enhanced by the soft, natural light filtering through sheer curtains, casting gentle shadows that create a homely ambiance. nnThe family members are engrossed in the task of using a laptop and a smartphone to navigate government financial services, their faces adorned with expressions of trust and contentment, radiating a sense of security and satisfaction. The room is tastefully decorated in neutral tones, providing an inviting backdrop with light beige walls and a modest wooden coffee table. nnIn the corners, subtle indicators of Indian culture emerge; a few neatly stacked paperwork, a modest jar of Indian currency coins, and contemporary digital tools juxtaposed with traditional decorative elements like a potted plant or family photographs. This scene strikes a balance between modernity and authenticity, illustrating relatable daily life while avoiding a sterile corporate vibe, perfectly catering to the Indian audience's sentiment.nnCreate a realistic image for an EPFO (Employees' Provident Fund Organization) service page targeting the Indian audience. Show a modern office or home setting with an Indian family (young working professional, middle-aged employee, and elderly person) using a laptop or smartphone to access government financial services online. The expressions should reflect trust and satisfaction. Use soft natural lighting, neutral colors, and elements like paperwork, Indian currency, and digital tools subtly in the background. Avoid overly corporate or abstract visuals--focus on real-life scenarios and authentic Indian representation.","originalPrompt":"Create a realistic image for an EPFO (Employees' Provident Fund Organization) service page targeting the Indian audience. Show a modern office or home setting with an Indian family (young working professional, middle-aged employee, and elderly person) using a laptop or smartphone to access government financial services online. The expressions should reflect trust and satisfaction. Use soft natural lighting, neutral colors, and elements like paperwork, Indian currency, and digital tools subtly in the background. Avoid overly corporate or abstract visuals--focus on real-life scenarios and authentic Indian representation.","width":1024,"height":576,"seed":43,"model":"flux","nologo":true,"negative_prompt":"worst quality, blurry","nofeed":true,"safe":false,"isMature":false,"isChild":false}

item.title: ESI
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.excerpt:encoded: {"prompt":"Illustrate a genuine scene within a hospital or clinic, centered around a diverse assembly of Indian laborers and their families, aimed at conveying the significance of the Employees' State Insurance (ESI) service. The atmosphere should be inviting, showcasing a compassionate healthcare professional--either a doctor or nurse--engaged in a friendly dialogue with a worker, who may represent either the blue-collar sector or an office environment, alongside their family members. Incorporate realistic details such as the ESI card visibly held by the worker, symbolizing accessibility to healthcare. The expressions on their faces should radiate joy and comfort, reflecting the reassurance of affordable care. Employ warm, gentle lighting and soft pastel hues to enhance a sense of trust and security. Ensure the setting feels contemporary and immaculate, steering clear of exaggerated or whimsical representations, instead focusing on authentic Indian cultural elements in this relatable healthcare scenario.nnCreate a realistic and relatable image for the Employees' State Insurance (ESI) service page targeting the Indian audience. Depict a diverse group of Indian workers and their families in a hospital or clinic setting, highlighting affordable healthcare services. Show a caring doctor or nurse interacting with a worker (blue-collar or office worker) and their family. Include subtle elements like the ESI card, medical consultation, and happy, relaxed expressions. Use warm lighting, soft colors, and a clean, modern look to convey trust, care, and well-being. Avoid cartoonish or abstract visuals--focus on authentic Indian scenarios.","originalPrompt":"Create a realistic and relatable image for the Employees' State Insurance (ESI) service page targeting the Indian audience. Depict a diverse group of Indian workers and their families in a hospital or clinic setting, highlighting affordable healthcare services. Show a caring doctor or nurse interacting with a worker (blue-collar or office worker) and their family. Include subtle elements like the ESI card, medical consultation, and happy, relaxed expressions. Use warm lighting, soft colors, and a clean, modern look to convey trust, care, and well-being. Avoid cartoonish or abstract visuals--focus on authentic Indian scenarios.","width":1024,"height":576,"seed":43,"model":"flux","nologo":true,"negative_prompt":"worst quality, blurry","nofeed":true,"safe":false,"isMature":false,"isChild":false}

a:6:{s:5:"width";i:1024;s:6:"height";i:576;s:4:"file";s:29:"2025/02/Factory-employees.jpg";s:8:"filesize";i:120550;s:5:"sizes";a:3:{s:6:"medium";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:29:"Factory-employees-300x169.jpg";s:5:"width";i:300;s:6:"height";i:169;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:20598;}s:9:"thumbnail";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:29:"Factory-employees-150x150.jpg";s:5:"width";i:150;s:6:"height";i:150;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:11504;}s:12:"medium_large";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:29:"Factory-employees-768x432.jpg";s:5:"width";i:768;s:6:"height";i:432;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:76581;}}s:10:"image_meta";a:12:{s:8:"aperture";s:1:"0";s:6:"credit";s:0:"";s:6:"camera";s:0:"";s:7:"caption";s:2547:"{"prompt":"Imagine a vibrant scene within a bustling manufacturing facility in India, emphasizing the principles of industrial safety and worker welfare. Depict a diverse group of Indian employees adorned in appropriate safety attire--hard hats, durable gloves, and neon reflective vests--actively engaged in secure operational tasks. Illustrate a dynamic factory manager alongside a vigilant safety officer, diligently reviewing the workspace to ensure all practices adhere to labor regulations. The atmosphere is illuminated with warm, inviting natural light that reflects professionalism and a deep commitment to safety and care.nnIncorporate striking visual elements such as clearly marked safety signage, cutting-edge machinery, and a meticulously organized production floor that enhances the feeling of efficiency. Capture the essence of a positive, secure, and inclusive work environment, where each individual feels valued and protected. Use rich, earthy colors to evoke warmth and trust, while infusing the entire composition with an air of optimism and diligence surrounding workplace safety.nnCreate a realistic image for a Factories Act service page in India, focusing on industrial safety, worker welfare, and compliance. Show a manufacturing factory setting with Indian workers wearing safety gear (helmets, gloves, reflective vests) engaged in safe operations. Depict a factory manager and a safety officer inspecting the workplace, ensuring compliance with labor laws. Use warm tones and natural light to convey professionalism, safety, and care. Highlight visual elements such as safety signs, modern machinery, and a well-organized factory environment. Ensure a positive, safe, and inclusive workplace atmosphere.","originalPrompt":"Create a realistic image for a Factories Act service page in India, focusing on industrial safety, worker welfare, and compliance. Show a manufacturing factory setting with Indian workers wearing safety gear (helmets, gloves, reflective vests) engaged in safe operations. Depict a factory manager and a safety officer inspecting the workplace, ensuring compliance with labor laws. Use warm tones and natural light to convey professionalism, safety, and care. Highlight visual elements such as safety signs, modern machinery, and a well-organized factory environment. Ensure a positive, safe, and inclusive workplace atmosphere.","width":1024,"height":576,"seed":43,"model":"flux","nologo":true,"negative_prompt":"worst quality, blurry","nofeed":true,"safe":false,"isMature":false,"isChild":false}";s:17:"created_timestamp";s:1:"0";s:9:"copyright";s:0:"";s:12:"focal_length";s:1:"0";s:3:"iso";s:1:"0";s:13:"shutter_speed";s:1:"0";s:5:"title";s:0:"";s:11:"orientation";s:1:"1";s:8:"keywords";a:0:{}}}

a:6:{s:5:"width";i:1024;s:6:"height";i:576;s:4:"file";s:22:"2025/02/Compliance.jpg";s:8:"filesize";i:120620;s:5:"sizes";a:3:{s:6:"medium";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:22:"Compliance-300x169.jpg";s:5:"width";i:300;s:6:"height";i:169;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:18537;}s:9:"thumbnail";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:22:"Compliance-150x150.jpg";s:5:"width";i:150;s:6:"height";i:150;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:10108;}s:12:"medium_large";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:22:"Compliance-768x432.jpg";s:5:"width";i:768;s:6:"height";i:432;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:73329;}}s:10:"image_meta";a:12:{s:8:"aperture";s:1:"0";s:6:"credit";s:0:"";s:6:"camera";s:0:"";s:7:"caption";s:2511:"{"prompt":"Visualize a polished and authentic scene designed for a compliance consulting service webpage, specifically aimed at Indian enterprises. Picture a contemporary office environment where a compliance consultant, dressed in sharp formal wear, engages in a detailed conversation about regulatory obligations with a varied assembly of business proprietors and managerial figures. The workspace is adorned with elements such as legal documentation, meticulously arranged checklists, laptops open with data dashboards, and insightful charts splayed across the table. Envision the room infused with a sense of collaboration and reliability, emanating a warm glow from sophisticated lighting that enhances the refined, uncluttered aesthetics. Integrate subtle nods to Indian culture, showcasing the richness in diversity with varied ethnic backgrounds among the participants, Indian currency notes artfully placed within reach, and local business symbols that resonate with the audience, enriching the scene with authenticity.nnCreate a professional and realistic image for a compliance consulting service page, targeting Indian businesses. Depict a modern office setting with a compliance consultant (business professional in formal attire) discussing regulatory requirements with a diverse group of business owners and managers. Include elements like legal documents, checklists, laptops, and data charts on the table. The atmosphere should feel collaborative, trustworthy, and organized, with warm lighting and clean, modern visuals. Subtle Indian cultural touches (ethnic diversity, Indian currency notes, or local business elements) should reflect the target audience."","originalPrompt":"Create a professional and realistic image for a compliance consulting service page, targeting Indian businesses. Depict a modern office setting with a compliance consultant (business professional in formal attire) discussing regulatory requirements with a diverse group of business owners and managers. Include elements like legal documents, checklists, laptops, and data charts on the table. The atmosphere should feel collaborative, trustworthy, and organized, with warm lighting and clean, modern visuals. Subtle Indian cultural touches (ethnic diversity, Indian currency notes, or local business elements) should reflect the target audience."","width":1024,"height":576,"seed":43,"model":"flux","nologo":true,"negative_prompt":"worst quality, blurry","nofeed":true,"safe":false,"isMature":false,"isChild":false}";s:17:"created_timestamp";s:1:"0";s:9:"copyright";s:0:"";s:12:"focal_length";s:1:"0";s:3:"iso";s:1:"0";s:13:"shutter_speed";s:1:"0";s:5:"title";s:0:"";s:11:"orientation";s:1:"1";s:8:"keywords";a:0:{}}}

a:6:{s:5:"width";i:1024;s:6:"height";i:576;s:4:"file";s:29:"2025/02/Digital-Marketing.jpg";s:8:"filesize";i:114161;s:5:"sizes";a:3:{s:6:"medium";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:29:"Digital-Marketing-300x169.jpg";s:5:"width";i:300;s:6:"height";i:169;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:19005;}s:9:"thumbnail";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:29:"Digital-Marketing-150x150.jpg";s:5:"width";i:150;s:6:"height";i:150;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:10266;}s:12:"medium_large";a:5:{s:4:"file";s:29:"Digital-Marketing-768x432.jpg";s:5:"width";i:768;s:6:"height";i:432;s:9:"mime-type";s:10:"image/jpeg";s:8:"filesize";i:72914;}}s:10:"image_meta";a:12:{s:8:"aperture";s:1:"0";s:6:"credit";s:0:"";s:6:"camera";s:0:"";s:7:"caption";s:2229:"{"prompt":"Draft an engaging and contemporary visual representation for a digital marketing service webpage aimed at Indian entrepreneurs and businesses. Illustrate a lively office setting, bustling with a diverse ensemble of young professionals collaboratively engaged in data analysis and strategic discussions. Incorporate dynamic elements such as social media logos, SEO performance graphs, smartphones, and expansive digital displays showcasing marketing metrics and upward trends. Emphasize a vivid atmosphere infused with bright illumination, capturing a tech-driven and high-energy essence, highlighted by a harmonious blend of azure and tangerine hues. The ambiance should reflect a creative and swift-paced spirit, symbolizing the innovation and advancement prevalent within the Indian digital marketing realm.nnCreate a dynamic and modern image for a digital marketing service page targeting Indian businesses and entrepreneurs. Depict a diverse group of young professionals working in a vibrant office, analyzing data, discussing strategies, and using digital tools. Show elements like social media icons, SEO charts, mobile devices, and large screens displaying marketing analytics and growth graphs. Use bright lighting and a tech-savvy, energetic vibe with a mix of blue and orange tones. Ensure the environment feels creative and fast-paced, representing innovation and growth in the Indian digital marketing space.","originalPrompt":"Create a dynamic and modern image for a digital marketing service page targeting Indian businesses and entrepreneurs. Depict a diverse group of young professionals working in a vibrant office, analyzing data, discussing strategies, and using digital tools. Show elements like social media icons, SEO charts, mobile devices, and large screens displaying marketing analytics and growth graphs. item.title: Appointment
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
APPOINTMENT

Book an Appointment

Book an Appointment with Our Care Experts

Schedule an appointment today with our experienced caregivers and let’s create a personalized care plan that fits your needs.

  • Free initial consultation – no obligations
  • Flexible scheduling, including same-day appointments
  • Professional, certified, and compassionate caregivers
Need Immediate Assistance?

Visit us: 28 Jumps St, PNM, Indonesia

Call us now: +123 456 789

Email us: support@recare.com

Got Questions? We’ve Got Answers!

Have questions about our home care services? Find all the answers here! If you need further assistance, feel free to contact us directly.

item.title: hello-elementor

item.title: FAQs
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
FAQs

Frequently Asked Questions

Got Questions? We’ve Got Answers!

Have questions about our home care services? Find all the answers here! If you need further assistance, feel free to contact us directly.

What is Recare? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast Who can benefit from Recare’s services? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast Where does Recare provide services? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast How do I get started with Recare’s services? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast What services does Recare offer? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast Can I customize the care services based on my needs? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast How do you ensure the quality of caregivers and nurses? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast Can I request a male or female caregiver? Far far away, behind the word mountains, far from the countries Vokalia and Consonantia, there live the blind texts. Separated they live in Bookmarksgrove right at the coast

From First Consultation to Continuous Support and Care

At Recare, we make it easy to get the care your loved ones need. Our step-by-step process ensures a seamless experience, from your first consultation to ongoing support. Here’s how we work.

01
Initial Contact

Reach out to us via phone, email, or our online form to start the process.

02
Assessment & Planning

Our team conducts a detailed assessment of your loved one’s needs and preferences.

03
Match with a Caregiver

We pair you with the perfect caregiver or nurse who aligns with your requirements.

04
Ongoing Support

We provide regular check-ins and adjust the care plan as needed to ensure continuous satisfaction.

item.title: Single Post
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
HOME NURSING

The Ultimate Guide to Home Nursing Care

  • January 29, 2025
  • No Comment

Introduction

As healthcare continues to evolve, home nursing care has become an essential option for individuals who need medical assistance but prefer the comfort of their own homes. Whether it's for post-surgery recovery, elderly care, chronic illness management, or disability support, home nursing provides professional healthcare services tailored to individual needs.

In this comprehensive guide, we’ll cover everything you need to know about home nursing care, including its benefits, services, costs, and how to choose the right provider.

Duis a urna non ante fringilla cursus vitae nec ante. Praesent a euismod sapien. Proin tincidunt mattis nulla in finibus. Integer at nisi tempor, sagittis nisl ut, tincidunt tellus.

What is Home Nursing Care?

Home nursing care refers to professional medical and personal care services delivered at home. It is an alternative to hospital or nursing home care and is designed to provide personalized treatment while promoting independence and comfort for the patient.

Home nursing services are typically provided by registered nurses (RNs), licensed practical nurses (LPNs), and certified caregivers, ensuring that patients receive professional healthcare while staying in familiar surroundings.

Benefits of Home Nursing Care

Home nursing care offers multiple advantages for both patients and their families, including:

  • Comfort & Convenience
  • Personalized Care Plans
  • Cost-Effective Alternative
  • Prevents Hospital Readmissions
  • Family Involvement

Home nursing services are typically provided by registered nurses (RNs), licensed practical nurses (LPNs), and certified caregivers, ensuring that patients receive professional healthcare while staying in familiar surroundings.<\/p>","_margin":{"unit":"px","top":"0","right":"0","bottom":"-14","left":"0","isLinked":false},"_background_image":{"url":"","id":"","size":""},"_background_slideshow_gallery":[],"_background_hover_image":{"url":"","id":"","size":""},"_background_hover_slideshow_gallery":[]},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"43a998bc","elType":"widget","settings":{"space":{"unit":"px","size":5,"sizes":[]},"_background_image":{"url":"","id":"","size":""},"_background_slideshow_gallery":[],"_background_hover_image":{"url":"","id":"","size":""},"_background_hover_slideshow_gallery":[]},"elements":[],"widgetType":"spacer"},{"id":"19a8ff94","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Benefits of Home Nursing Care","header_size":"h4","_background_image":{"url":"","id":"","size":""},"_background_slideshow_gallery":[],"_background_hover_image":{"url":"","id":"","size":""},"_background_hover_slideshow_gallery":[]},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"302fc999","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

item.title: Contact Form
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
<label for="mf-input-text-2b66d1da">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Your Name`) } 					
				</label>
			<input type="text" id="mf-input-text-2b66d1da" 
				name="mf-listing-fname" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Your Name`) } "
				onInput=${ parent.handleChange }
									aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-listing-fname'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${ el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el) }
							/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-listing-fname"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label for="mf-input-email-7cb60821">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email Address`) } 					
				</label>
			<input 
				type="email" 
				defaultValue="" 
				class="mf-input " 
				id="mf-input-email-7cb60821" 
				name="mf-email" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email Address`) } " 
				onBlur=${parent.handleChange} onFocus=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-email'] ? 'true' : 'false' } 
				ref=${el=> parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","emailMessage":"Please enter a valid Email address","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)}
							/>
						<${validation.ErrorMessage} 
				errors=${validation.errors} 
				name="mf-email" 
				as=${html``}
			/>
							<label for="mf-input-text-area-4744bf69">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Message`) } 					
				</label>
			<textarea id="mf-input-text-area-4744bf69"
				name="mf-textarea" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Message`) } "
				cols="30" rows="10"
									onInput=${ parent.handleChange }
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-textarea'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${ el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)}
								></textarea>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-textarea"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<button type="submit" id="">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Send Message`) } 
				</button>

item.title: Appointment Form
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
<label for="mf-input-text-59391fd7">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Your Name`) } 					
				</label>
			<input type="text" id="mf-input-text-59391fd7" 
				name="mf-listing-fname" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Your Name`) } "
				onInput=${ parent.handleChange }
									aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-listing-fname'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${ el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el) }
							/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-listing-fname"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label for="mf-input-telephone-30639d4">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Phone Number`) } 					
				</label>
			<input
				type="tel"
				class="mf-input "
				id="mf-input-telephone-30639d4" 
				name="mf-telephone"
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Phone Number`) } "
									onInput=${parent.handleChange}
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-telephone'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)}
								/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-telephone"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label for="mf-input-email-1bc531db">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email Address`) } 					
				</label>
			<input 
				type="email" 
				defaultValue="" 
				class="mf-input " 
				id="mf-input-email-1bc531db" 
				name="mf-email" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email Address`) } " 
				onBlur=${parent.handleChange} onFocus=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-email'] ? 'true' : 'false' } 
				ref=${el=> parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","emailMessage":"Please enter a valid Email address","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)}
							/>
						<${validation.ErrorMessage} 
				errors=${validation.errors} 
				name="mf-email" 
				as=${html``}
			/>
							<label className="mf-input-label" htmlFor="mf-input-date-521f588f">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Select Date`) } 					
				</label>
			<${props.Flatpickr}
					name="mf-date"
					className="mf-input mf-date-input mf-left-parent  "
					placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Select Date`) } "
					options=${{"minDate":"","maxDate":"","dateFormat":"m-d-Y","enableTime":"","disable":[],"mode":"single","static":true,"disableMobile":true,"time_24hr":false}}
					value=${parent.getValue('mf-date')}
					onInput=${parent.handleDateTime}
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-date'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${el => props.DateWidget(
							el, 
							'', 
							{"message":"This field is required.","required":false},  
							register, 
							parent 
						)}
					/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-date"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label className="mf-input-label" htmlFor="mf-input-select-5afbd8b">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Select Services`) } 					
				</label>
            <${props.Select}
                className=${"mf-input mf-input-select  " + ( validation.errors['mf-select'] ? 'mf-invalid' : '' )}
                classNamePrefix="mf_select"
                name="mf-select"
                placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Select Services`) } "
                isSearchable=${false}
                options=${[{"label":"Personalized Home Care","value":"value-1","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Skilled Nursing Services","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Companionship & Emotional Support","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Elderly Care","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Palliative & Hospice Care","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Rehabilitation Support","value":"value-3","isDisabled":false}]}
                value=${parent.getValue("mf-select") ? [{"label":"Personalized Home Care","value":"value-1","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Skilled Nursing Services","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Companionship & Emotional Support","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Elderly Care","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Palliative & Hospice Care","value":"value-2","isDisabled":false},{"label":"Rehabilitation Support","value":"value-3","isDisabled":false}].filter(item => item.value === parent.getValue("mf-select"))[0] : []}
                onChange=${(e)=> parent.handleSelect(e, "mf-select")}
                ref=${() => {
				                    register({ name: "mf-select" }, parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false}));
                    if ( parent.getValue("mf-select") === '' && false ) {
				    parent.setValue( 'mf-select', '', true );
                        parent.handleChange({
                            target: {
                                name: 'mf-select',
                                value: ''
                            }
                        });
                    }
                }}
                />
            				<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-select"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label for="mf-input-text-area-767cf8d">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Message`) } 					
				</label>
			<textarea id="mf-input-text-area-767cf8d"
				name="mf-textarea" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Message`) } "
				cols="30" rows="10"
									onInput=${ parent.handleChange }
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-textarea'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${ el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)}
								></textarea>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-textarea"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<button type="submit" id="">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Submit Button`) } 
				</button>

item.title: Service Details
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
SERVICE DETAILS

Compassionate Care

More Services

  • Skilled Nursing Service
  • Emotional Support
  • Elderly Care
  • Palliative & Hospice Care
  • Rehabilitation Support

Get the Care Your Loved One Deserves

Need compassionate care for yourself or a loved one? Contact us today for a free consultation!

Free Consultation

Compassionate Care: Providing Comfort, Dignity, and Support

At Recare, we believe that every individual deserves compassionate and personalized care. Our Compassionate Care service is designed to provide emotional, physical, and daily living support for seniors, individuals with disabilities, and those in need of professional yet heartfelt assistance.

Why Choose Our Compassionate Care Service?

We understand that care is more than just assistance—it’s about providing dignity, respect, and companionship to those who need it most. Our trained caregivers ensure that every individual receives personalized attention and a warm, nurturing environment at home.

  • Personalized Care Plans – Tailored to individual needs and preferences.
  • Trained & Certified Caregivers – Compassionate professionals dedicated to well-being.
  • 24/7 Support Available – Flexible care, whether for a few hours or full-time assistance.
  • Emotional & Social Support – Helping clients stay engaged and connected.
  • Safe & Comfortable Environment – Ensuring well-being in the comfort of home.

Our Compassionate Care Services Include:

1. Daily Living Assistance
  • Helping with personal hygiene (bathing, dressing, grooming).
  • Assisting with mobility and transfers.
  • Meal preparation and feeding support.
  • Light housekeeping to maintain a clean environment.
  • Helping with personal hygiene (bathing, dressing, grooming).
2. Emotional & Social Support
  • Providing companionship and meaningful conversations.
  • Encouraging hobbies, activities, and mental engagement.
  • Assisting with communication and social interactions.
3. Medication & Health Monitoring
  • Reminding and assisting with medications.
  • Monitoring vital signs and overall health conditions.
  • Coordinating with healthcare professionals if needed.
4. Family Support & Respite Care
  • Giving family caregivers time to rest and recharge.
  • Educating families on best caregiving practices.
  • Providing emotional support for both clients and families.

Compassion in Action

Phasellus porttitor dolor nec arcu euismod, sed eleifend ipsum tempor. Fusce turpis odio, condimentum sit amet libero ut, pretium pharetra lacus. Pellentesque rutrum felis vel tincidunt efficitur. Sed in euismod lacus. Maecenas id auctor purus, in pretium turpis. Ut dignissim risus ac sem dignissim, sit amet placerat magna sodales.Vivamus semper ultrices ligula, non maximus arcu tempor suscipit.

Fusce ipsum ligula, cursus at auctor eu, suscipit vitae ligula. Proin fringilla egestas dui, eget lobortis lacus rhoncus ac. Nam dignissim dolor gravida facilisis cursus. Donec quis massa at libero elementum porttitor ac consectetur tellus. Nam suscipit pulvinar ex.

item.title: Contact
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
CONTACT

Contact Us

We're Here to Help – Contact Recare Today!

Have questions about our home care services? Need to book an appointment? Our team is ready to assist you. Reach out to us via phone, email, or by filling out the form below. We look forward to helping you and your loved ones!

  • 28 Jumps St, PNM, Indonesia
  • +123 456 789
  • support@recare.com

Send us a message

item.title: Newsletter Form
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
<input 
				type="email" 
				defaultValue="" 
				class="mf-input " 
				id="mf-input-email-5007610a" 
				name="mf-email" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email Address`) } " 
				onBlur=${parent.handleChange} onFocus=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-email'] ? 'true' : 'false' } 
				ref=${el=> parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","emailMessage":"Please enter a valid Email address","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)}
							/>
						<${validation.ErrorMessage} 
				errors=${validation.errors} 
				name="mf-email" 
				as=${html``}
			/>
							<button type="submit" id="">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Subscribe Now`) } 
				</button>

item.title: About
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
ABOUT

About Recare

Your Trusted Partner in Home Care & Nursing Services

We specialize in providing professional home care and private nursing services that prioritize health, comfort, and happiness of your loved ones.

Compassionate Care

We treat everyone with the kindness and respect they deserve. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur.

Personalized Solutions

We treat everyone with the kindness and respect they deserve. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur.

Reliability You Can Trust

We treat everyone with the kindness and respect they deserve. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur.

Years of Experience 0 Trusted Center 0 + Happy Clients 0 + CORE VALUES

The Heart of Our Care

At Recare, our values are the foundation of everything we do. They guide our approach to care, ensuring that every individual we serve experiences compassion, professionalism, and peace of mind.

  • Compassion
  • Integrity
  • Excellence
  • Personalization
  • Reliability
  • Innovation
Alexander Fischer

Senior Care Specialist

Isabelle Moreau

Chief Nursing Officer

Our Dedicated Caregiver

Our team consists of experienced caregivers, professional nurses, and healthcare specialists dedicated to providing the best home care solutions.

  • Certified & Experienced Nurses
  • Compassionate & Patient-Centered Approach
  • Trained in Elderly & Post-Surgery Care
  • Available for 24/7 Support & Consultation

From First Consultation to Continuous Support and Care

At Recare, we make it easy to get the care your loved ones need. Our step-by-step process ensures a seamless experience, from your first consultation to ongoing support. Here’s how we work.

01
Initial Contact

Reach out to us via phone, email, or our online form to start the process.

02
Assessment & Planning

Our team conducts a detailed assessment of your loved one’s needs and preferences.

03
Match with a Caregiver

We pair you with the perfect caregiver or nurse who aligns with your requirements.

04
Ongoing Support

We provide regular check-ins and adjust the care plan as needed to ensure continuous satisfaction.

item.title: Blog Post V2
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
ARTICLE

A Complete Guide to EPFO Compliance for Employers​

Ensure Seamless Compliance Today

Need expert guidance on EPFO, ESI, or compliance services? Get in touch for a free consultation!

Free Consultation
  • A Complete Guide to EPFO Compliance for Employers
  • Top Common Mistakes in EPFO Claim and How to Avoid Them
  • Factories Act Compliance for Small and Medium Enterprises
  • Understanding ESI Benefits for Employers and Employees​
  • A Complete Guide to EPFO Compliance for Employers - old

The Employees' Provident Fund Organization (EPFO) is a statutory body under the Ministry of Labour and Employment, Government of India. It administers a compulsory contributory Provident Fund Scheme, Pension Scheme, and Insurance Scheme for the workforce engaged in the organized sector in India. This guide provides a comprehensive overview of EPFO compliance for employers, covering everything from registration to contributions and filing.

What is EPFO?

EPFO is responsible for the administration of the Employees' Provident Fund and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952. It aims to promote retirement savings for employees and provide social security benefits.

Key Schemes under EPFO

  • Employees' Provident Fund (EPF) Scheme, 1952: A savings scheme where both the employer and employee contribute a certain percentage of the employee's salary.
  • Employees' Pension Scheme (EPS), 1995: Provides pension benefits to employees after retirement.
  • Employees' Deposit Linked Insurance (EDLI) Scheme, 1976: Provides insurance coverage to employees.

Who Needs to Register?

Any establishment employing 20 or more persons is required to register with the EPFO. However, establishments with fewer than 20 employees can also voluntarily register.

Registration Process

  • Online Registration: Employers can register online through the EPFO's official portal.
  • Documentation: Required documents include the establishment's PAN, address proof, and details of employees.
  • Approval: Once the application is submitted, it is reviewed by the EPFO, and upon approval, a unique code is assigned to the establishment.

Contribution Rates

  • Employer's Contribution: 12% of the employee's basic salary (including dearness allowance and retaining allowance).

  • Employee's Contribution: 12% of the basic salary.

Breakdown of Contributions

  • EPF: 8.33% of the employer's contribution goes to the EPF, and the remaining 3.67% goes to the EPS.
  • EDLI: 0.5% of the employer's contribution goes to the EDLI scheme.

Calculation Example

For an employee with a basic salary of INR 15,000:

  • Employer's contribution: INR 1,800 (12% of INR 15,000)
  • Employee's contribution: INR 1,800 (12% of INR 15,000)
  • Total contribution: INR 3,600

Monthly Returns

Employers are required to file monthly returns, including:

  • Form 5: Particulars of employees for whom contributions are paid.
  • Form 10: Monthly remittance statement.
  • Form 12A: Annual contribution statement.

Filing Process

  1. Online Filing: Returns can be filed online through the EPFO portal.
  2. Payment: Contributions can be paid online through the EPFO portal or designated banks.
  3. Deadlines: Monthly returns and contributions must be filed by the 15th of the following month. Annual returns must be filed by April 30th of the following year.

Late Payment Penalties

  • Interest: Late payments attract interest at the rate of 12% per annum.
  • Damages: Additional damages up to 25% of the arrears may be levied.

Non-Compliance Penalties

  • Fines: Non-compliance can result in fines and imprisonment.
  • Inspection: EPFO inspectors can conduct inspections and impose penalties for non-compliance.

Best Practices for EPFO Compliance

  1. Regular Audits: Conduct regular internal audits to ensure compliance.
  2. Timely Filing: File returns and make contributions on time to avoid penalties.
  3. Employee Education: Educate employees about the benefits of EPFO schemes.
  4. Record Keeping: Maintain accurate records of employee contributions and returns.

Conclusion

EPFO compliance is a critical aspect of employment regulations in India. By understanding the registration process, contribution rates, and filing requirements, employers can ensure they meet their obligations and provide social security benefits to their employees. Regular audits and timely filings are essential to avoid penalties and ensure smooth operations.

For more information, visit the EPFO official website.

  • Employees' Deposit Linked Insurance (EDLI) Scheme, 1976: Provides insurance coverage to employees.<\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"align":"justify","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"f1c1c1c","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Who Needs to Register?","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=3b72906"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"66bb58c2","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

    Any establishment employing 20 or more persons is required to register with the EPFO. However, establishments with fewer than 20 employees can also voluntarily register.<\/p>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"3299c557","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Registration Process","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=3b72906"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"56ee7180","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

    • Online Registration:<\/strong> Employers can register online through the EPFO's official portal.<\/li>
    • Documentation<\/strong>: Required documents include the establishment's PAN, address proof, and details of employees.<\/li>
    • Approval:<\/strong> Once the application is submitted, it is reviewed by the EPFO, and upon approval, a unique code is assigned to the establishment.<\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"3ff5c98b","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Contribution Rates","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"396326","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

      • Employer's Contribution<\/strong>: 12% of the employee's basic salary (including dearness allowance and retaining allowance).<\/p><\/li>

      • Employee's Contribution<\/strong>: 12% of the basic salary.<\/p><\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"6c352cbe","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Breakdown of Contributions","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=3b72906"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"70010b3c","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

        • EPF<\/strong>: 8.33% of the employer's contribution goes to the EPF, and the remaining 3.67% goes to the EPS.<\/li>
        • EDLI<\/strong>: 0.5% of the employer's contribution goes to the EDLI scheme.<\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"58aaa73a","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Calculation Example","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"3668933f","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

          For an employee with a basic salary of INR 15,000:<\/p>

          • Employer's contribution:<\/strong> INR 1,800 (12% of INR 15,000)<\/li>
          • Employee's contribution:<\/strong> INR 1,800 (12% of INR 15,000)<\/li>
          • Total contribution:<\/strong> INR 3,600<\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"1b0c9d89","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Monthly Returns","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"3d52871e","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

            Employers are required to file monthly returns, including:<\/p>

            • Form 5<\/strong>: Particulars of employees for whom contributions are paid.<\/li>
            • Form 10<\/strong>: Monthly remittance statement.<\/li>
            • Form 12A<\/strong>: Annual contribution statement.<\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"3227cc07","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Filing Process","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"6572ade1","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"
              1. Online Filing<\/strong>: Returns can be filed online through the EPFO portal.<\/li>
              2. Payment<\/strong>: Contributions can be paid online through the EPFO portal or designated banks.<\/li>
              3. Deadlines<\/strong>: Monthly returns and contributions must be filed by the 15th of the following month. Annual returns must be filed by April 30th of the following year.<\/li><\/ol>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"34d6ae85","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Late Payment Penalties","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"4c5a896a","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"
                • Interest<\/strong>: Late payments attract interest at the rate of 12% per annum.<\/li>
                • Damages<\/strong>: Additional damages up to 25% of the arrears may be levied.<\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"align":"justify","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"5929ff5","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Non-Compliance Penalties","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"1ebc14dc","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"
                  • Fines<\/strong>: Non-compliance can result in fines and imprisonment.<\/li>
                  • Inspection<\/strong>: EPFO inspectors can conduct inspections and impose penalties for non-compliance.<\/li><\/ul>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"align":"justify","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"2518761f","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Best Practices for EPFO Compliance","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"2e0fd62b","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"
                    1. Regular Audits<\/strong>: Conduct regular internal audits to ensure compliance.<\/li>
                    2. Timely Filing<\/strong>: File returns and make contributions on time to avoid penalties.<\/li>
                    3. Employee Education<\/strong>: Educate employees about the benefits of EPFO schemes.<\/li>
                    4. Record Keeping<\/strong>: Maintain accurate records of employee contributions and returns.<\/li><\/ol>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"},{"id":"4287c7c3","elType":"widget","settings":{"title":"Conclusion","header_size":"h4","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"heading"},{"id":"150f9077","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

                      EPFO compliance is a critical aspect of employment regulations in India. By understanding the registration process, contribution rates, and filing requirements, employers can ensure they meet their obligations and provide social security benefits to their employees. Regular audits and timely filings are essential to avoid penalties and ensure smooth operations.<\/p>

                      For more information, visit the EPFO official website<\/a>.<\/p>","_element_width":"inherit","_element_custom_width":{"unit":"%","size":70,"sizes":[]},"align":"justify","__globals__":{"typography_typography":"globals\/typography?id=a692972"}},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":true}],"isInner":false}]

/ Month

Ideal for small teams and startups lorem leo ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur.

  • Desks for up to 5 team members.
  • 24/7 access to the coworking space.

  • Free use of conference rooms.

Get Started Now
  • What Our Members Say

Building Connections, Inspiring Success.

“Brisk is a game-changer for my freelance work! The space is vibrant, and the amenities are fantastic. I’ve met like-minded professionals who inspire me every day. Highly recommend it for anyone looking for productivity and connection!”

Sarah Lee Graphic Designer

“Our team has been more productive than ever since moving to Brisk. The dedicated desks and 24/7 access make it easy for us to work on our own terms. It’s the best decision we’ve made for our startup!”

Jason Meyer Co-Founder

“I love the sense of community here. The networking events and workshops have helped me grow professionally and expand my business connections. Brisk is more than just a workspace—it’s a hub for growth!”

Emily Tran Marketing Consultant

“As a content creator, having a comfortable and creative space is crucial. Brisk provides everything I need, from fast Wi-Fi to a welcoming atmosphere. It’s my go-to spot for getting things done.”

Alex Morales Content Creator

“Brisk stands out with its flexibility and top-notch facilities. The coffee is amazing, the staff is friendly, and I always feel energized to tackle my projects. A perfect space for professionals like me!”

Diana Roberts Financial Advisor

“I needed a space for an important client meeting, and Brisk exceeded my expectations. The conference room was well-equipped and professional. My clients were impressed, and so was I!”

Michael Adams Business Consultant

Shaping the Future,
One Milestone at
a Time

0 +

Innovation Hub
  • Questions Answered

Everything You Need to Know

Can I bring guests to the coworking space?

Guests are welcome for meetings in our reserved rooms. For general workspace access, additional day passes may need to be purchased.

Do I need to book a desk in advance?

No advance booking is required for hot desks, as they are available on a first-come, first-served basis. However, meeting rooms and dedicated desks should be reserved in advance.

Is there high-speed Wi-Fi available?

Yes, all our plans include access to high-speed Wi-Fi, ensuring seamless connectivity for all your work needs.

What are your operating hours?

Our coworking space is open 24/7 for members with monthly plans. Day pass users can access the space during business hours, from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM.

Is there a cancellation policy for memberships?

Yes, monthly memberships can be canceled with a 30-day notice. Day passes and short-term packages are non-refundable.

item.title: Contact Us
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
<label for="mf-input-text-184663a1">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`First Name`) } 					*
				</label>
			<input
				type="text"
				class="mf-input mf-conditional-input"
				id="mf-input-text-184663a1"
				name="mf-first-name"
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`First name here`) } "
									onInput=${parent.handleChange}
					onBlur=${parent.handleChange}
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-first-name'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${el =>{
												parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)
					}}
								/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-first-name"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label for="mf-input-text-763108f5">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Last Name`) } 					*
				</label>
			<input
				type="text"
				class="mf-input mf-conditional-input"
				id="mf-input-text-763108f5"
				name="mf-last-name"
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Last name here`) } "
									onInput=${parent.handleChange}
					onBlur=${parent.handleChange}
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-last-name'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${el =>{
												parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)
					}}
								/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-last-name"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label for="mf-input-email-47e25ccc">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email Address`) } 					*
				</label>
			<input 
				type="email" 
				defaultValue="" 
				class="mf-input mf-conditional-input" 
				id="mf-input-email-47e25ccc" 
				name="mf-email" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Add email`) } " 
				onBlur=${parent.handleChange} onFocus=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-email'] ? 'true' : 'false' } 
				ref=${el=> parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","emailMessage":"Please enter a valid Email address","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)}
							/>
						<${validation.ErrorMessage} 
				errors=${validation.errors} 
				name="mf-email" 
				as=${html``}
			/>
							<label for="mf-input-text-20deb7b9">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Phone Number`) } 					*
				</label>
			<input
				type="text"
				class="mf-input mf-conditional-input"
				id="mf-input-text-20deb7b9"
				name="mf-subject"
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`+91 `) } "
									onInput=${parent.handleChange}
					onBlur=${parent.handleChange}
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-subject'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${el =>{
												parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)
					}}
								/>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-subject"
					as=${html``}
					/>
							<label for="mf-input-text-area-7e5c045e">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Comments / Questions`) } 					*
				</label>
			<textarea id="mf-input-text-area-7e5c045e"
				name="mf-comment" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Comments`) } "
				cols="30" rows="10"
									onInput=${ parent.handleChange }
					aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-comment'] ? 'true' : 'false'}
					ref=${ el => parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":true,"expression":"null"}, el)}
								></textarea>
							<${validation.ErrorMessage}
					errors=${validation.errors}
					name="mf-comment"
					as=${html``}
					/>
						<input type="hidden" name="g-recaptcha-response-v3" />
							<button type="submit" id="">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Send Message`) } 
				</button>

item.title: Newsletter form
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
<label for="mf-input-email-77afcfa">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Subscribe to newsletter`) } 					
				</label>
			<input 
				type="email" 
				defaultValue="" 
				class="mf-input " 
				id="mf-input-email-77afcfa" 
				name="mf-email" 
				placeholder="${ parent.decodeEntities(`Email`) } " 
				onBlur=${parent.handleChange} onFocus=${parent.handleChange} aria-invalid=${validation.errors['mf-email'] ? 'true' : 'false' } 
				ref=${el=> parent.activateValidation({"message":"This field is required.","emailMessage":"Please enter a valid Email address","minLength":1,"maxLength":"","type":"none","required":false,"expression":"null"}, el)}
							/>
						<${validation.ErrorMessage} 
				errors=${validation.errors} 
				name="mf-email" 
				as=${html``}
			/>
							<button type="submit" id="">
					${ parent.decodeEntities(`Submit`) } 
				</button>

item.title: EPFO
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
SERVICE DETAILS

Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)

More Services

  • Employees' State Insurance (ESI)
  • Digital Marketing
  • Health Insurance
  • Digital Signatures
  • Compliance Consulting
  • Factories Act

Ensure Seamless Compliance Today

Need expert guidance on EPFO, ESI, or compliance services? Get in touch for a free consultation!

Free Consultation

Effortless Provident Fund Compliance for Your Business

At SRSG Consulting, we specialize in providing comprehensive EPFO (Employees' Provident Fund Organisation) services to ensure your business complies with statutory obligations seamlessly. Our expert team is dedicated to simplifying the complexities of provident fund management, allowing you to focus on your core business operations.

Why Choose SRSG Consulting for EPFO Services?

Compliance doesn’t have to be complicated. With SRSG Consulting, you can ensure that your business meets all Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) requirements while focusing on growth and success. Let us handle the details so you can concentrate on what you do best.

  • Expert Knowledge: Our team stays updated on the latest EPFO regulations and compliance requirements, providing you with informed and reliable service.
  • Customized Solutions: We tailor our services to meet the specific needs of your business and workforce, ensuring that our solutions align with your unique requirements.
  • End-to-End Support: From initial registration to claim settlements, we offer comprehensive support at every stage of the EPFO process.
  • Time-Saving Processes: Our streamlined workflows save you time and reduce the administrative burden on your team, allowing you to focus on your core business activities.

Our EPFO Services Services Include:

1. EPFO Registration
  • Document Preparation and Submission: We assist in gathering and preparing all necessary documents required for EPFO registration, ensuring accuracy and completeness.
  • Timely and Error-Free Registration: Our team ensures that the registration process is completed promptly, minimizing errors and avoiding potential delays.
  • Post-Registration Compliance Guidance: After registration, we provide ongoing support to help you understand and meet all compliance requirements, keeping your business aligned with EPFO regulations.
2. EPFO Monthly Processing
  • Accurate Contribution Calculations: We handle the precise calculation of both employee and employer contributions, ensuring that all amounts are correctly computed as per EPFO guidelines.
  • Timely Filing and Submission of Returns: Our services include the prompt filing and submission of EPFO returns, preventing any late fees or penalties.
  • Discrepancy Resolution: In case of any discrepancies, we proactively address and resolve them to maintain seamless compliance with EPFO regulations.
3. EPFO Settlement
  • Efficient Claim Settlement: We facilitate quick and efficient settlement of EPFO claims, ensuring that employees can access their provident fund benefits without unnecessary delays.
  • Withdrawal Process Assistance: Our team provides guidance and support for both full and partial withdrawals, helping employees navigate the process smoothly.
  • Accurate Documentation: We ensure that all necessary documentation is accurate and complete, streamlining the settlement process and reducing the likelihood of issues.
Contact Us
  • Email: contact@srsgconsulting.com
  • Phone: +91 75987 87860
  • Address: Pollachi

Get started with our EPFO services today and experience stress-free compliance management

Book Your Free Consultation

{"timeout":1773361866,"value":{"content":"
SERVICE DETAILS

Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)

More Services

  • Employees' State Insurance (ESI)
  • Digital Marketing
  • Health Insurance
  • Digital Signatures
  • Compliance Consulting
  • Factories Act

Ensure Seamless Compliance Today

Need expert guidance on EPFO, ESI, or compliance services? Get in touch for a free consultation!

Free Consultation

Effortless Provident Fund Compliance for Your Business

[elementor-element k="bbcf93477e15cfe25f407e267a81771c" data=""]

Why Choose SRSG Consulting for EPFO Services?

[elementor-element k="bbcf93477e15cfe25f407e267a81771c" data=""]
  • Expert Knowledge: Our team stays updated on the latest EPFO regulations and compliance requirements, providing you with informed and reliable service.
  • Customized Solutions: We tailor our services to meet the specific needs of your business and workforce, ensuring that our solutions align with your unique requirements.
  • End-to-End Support: From initial registration to claim settlements, we offer comprehensive support at every stage of the EPFO process.
  • Time-Saving Processes: Our streamlined workflows save you time and reduce the administrative burden on your team, allowing you to focus on your core business activities.

Our EPFO Services Services Include:

1. EPFO Registration
  • Document Preparation and Submission: We assist in gathering and preparing all necessary documents required for EPFO registration, ensuring accuracy and completeness.
  • Timely and Error-Free Registration: Our team ensures that the registration process is completed promptly, minimizing errors and avoiding potential delays.
  • Post-Registration Compliance Guidance: After registration, we provide ongoing support to help you understand and meet all compliance requirements, keeping your business aligned with EPFO regulations.
2. EPFO Monthly Processing
  • Accurate Contribution Calculations: We handle the precise calculation of both employee and employer contributions, ensuring that all amounts are correctly computed as per EPFO guidelines.
  • Timely Filing and Submission of Returns: Our services include the prompt filing and submission of EPFO returns, preventing any late fees or penalties.
  • Discrepancy Resolution: In case of any discrepancies, we proactively address and resolve them to maintain seamless compliance with EPFO regulations.
3. EPFO Settlement
  • Efficient Claim Settlement: We facilitate quick and efficient settlement of EPFO claims, ensuring that employees can access their provident fund benefits without unnecessary delays.
  • Withdrawal Process Assistance: Our team provides guidance and support for both full and partial withdrawals, helping employees navigate the process smoothly.
  • Accurate Documentation: We ensure that all necessary documentation is accurate and complete, streamlining the settlement process and reducing the likelihood of issues.
Contact Us
[elementor-element k="bbcf93477e15cfe25f407e267a81771c" data=""]
Book Your Free Consultation

item.content:encoded:
SERVICE DETAILS

Employees’ State Insurance (ESI)

More Services

  • Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)
  • Digital Marketing
  • Health Insurance
  • Digital Signatures
  • Compliance Consulting
  • Factories Act

Ensure Seamless Compliance Today

Need expert guidance on EPFO, ESI, or compliance services? Get in touch for a free consultation!

Free Consultation

Efficient ESI Compliance and Employee Welfare Solutions

At SRSG Consulting, we offer a full range of Employees’ State Insurance (ESI) services to help businesses comply with statutory obligations while ensuring the welfare of their employees. Our experts are dedicated to making ESI management effortless for you, handling everything from registration to claim settlements with precision and professionalism.

With our support, your business can focus on growth while we take care of compliance and employee welfare needs.

Why Choose SRSG Consulting for ESI Services?

Compliance doesn’t have to be complicated. With SRSG Consulting, you can ensure that your business meets all Employees’ State Insurance (ESI) requirements while focusing on growth and success. Let us handle the details so you can concentrate on what you do best.

  • Compliance Expertise: Our team stays up-to-date with the latest ESI regulations and ensures that your business remains compliant at all times.
  • Tailored Solutions: We offer services customized to suit the specific needs of your business and workforce.
  • End-to-End Support: From initial registration to claim settlements, we provide continuous support at every step.
  • Time-Saving Processes: Our streamlined workflows save you time and reduce the administrative burden on your team, allowing you to focus on your core business activities.
  • Employee-Centric Approach: We prioritize employee welfare by ensuring smooth processing of claims and timely settlements.

Our EPFO Services Services Include:

1. ESI Registration
  • Assistance with ESI registration for quick and hassle-free onboarding.
  • Comprehensive guidance on document preparation and submission.
  • Timely and error-free registration to avoid penalties and delays.
  • Post-registration support to help you meet ongoing compliance requirements.
2. ESI Monthly Filing
  • Preparation and submission of monthly ESI contribution statements.
  • Accurate calculation of employer and employee contributions.
  • Ensuring timely filing to avoid penalties and maintain compliance.
  • Resolution of discrepancies for error-free submissions.
3. ESI Employee Registration
  • Quick and error-free employee registration.
  • Maintenance of employee data and records in compliance with regulations.
  • Integration of employee records into your organizational workflow.
  • Support for updating employee information as needed.
4. ESI Claims and Settlement
  • Expert assistance in filing and settling ESI claims, including medical, disability, maternity, and other benefits.
  • Guidance on preparing and submitting necessary documentation for claims.
  • Timely follow-up and settlement to ensure employees receive their benefits without delays.
  • Support for resolving claim-related issues.
Contact Us
  • Email: contact@srsgconsulting.com
  • Phone: +91 75987 87860
  • Address: Pollachi

Get started with our ESI services today and experience stress-free compliance management

{"timeout":1773361603,"value":{"content":"
SERVICE DETAILS

Employees’ State Insurance (ESI)

More Services

  • Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)
  • Digital Marketing
  • Health Insurance
  • Digital Signatures
  • Compliance Consulting
  • Factories Act

Ensure Seamless Compliance Today

Need expert guidance on EPFO, ESI, or compliance services? Get in touch for a free consultation!

Free Consultation

Efficient ESI Compliance and Employee Welfare Solutions

[elementor-element k="bbcf93477e15cfe25f407e267a81771c" data=""]

Why Choose SRSG Consulting for ESI Services?

[elementor-element k="bbcf93477e15cfe25f407e267a81771c" data=""]
  • Compliance Expertise: Our team stays up-to-date with the latest ESI regulations and ensures that your business remains compliant at all times.
  • Tailored Solutions: We offer services customized to suit the specific needs of your business and workforce.
  • End-to-End Support: From initial registration to claim settlements, we provide continuous support at every step.
  • Time-Saving Processes: Our streamlined workflows save you time and reduce the administrative burden on your team, allowing you to focus on your core business activities.
  • Employee-Centric Approach: We prioritize employee welfare by ensuring smooth processing of claims and timely settlements.

Our EPFO Services Services Include:

1. ESI Registration
  • Assistance with ESI registration for quick and hassle-free onboarding.
  • Comprehensive guidance on document preparation and submission.
  • Timely and error-free registration to avoid penalties and delays.
  • Post-registration support to help you meet ongoing compliance requirements.
2. ESI Monthly Filing
  • Preparation and submission of monthly ESI contribution statements.
  • Accurate calculation of employer and employee contributions.
  • Ensuring timely filing to avoid penalties and maintain compliance.
  • Resolution of discrepancies for error-free submissions.
3. ESI Employee Registration
  • Quick and error-free employee registration.
  • Maintenance of employee data and records in compliance with regulations.
  • Integration of employee records into your organizational workflow.
  • Support for updating employee information as needed.
4. ESI Claims and Settlement
  • Expert assistance in filing and settling ESI claims, including medical, disability, maternity, and other benefits.
  • Guidance on preparing and submitting necessary documentation for claims.
  • Timely follow-up and settlement to ensure employees receive their benefits without delays.
  • Support for resolving claim-related issues.
Contact Us
[elementor-element k="bbcf93477e15cfe25f407e267a81771c" data=""]
","scripts":[],"styles":[]}}

item.title: Digital Marketing
item.dc:creator: srsgconsulting@gmail.com
item.content:encoded:
SERVICE DETAILS

Digital Marketing

More Services

  • Employees' Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO)
  • Employees’ State Insurance (ESI)
  • Factories Act
  • Health Insurance
  • Digital Signatures
  • Compliance Consulting

Ensure Seamless Compliance Today

Need expert guidance on EPFO, ESI, or compliance services? Get in touch for a free consultation!

Free Consultation

Empowering Your Business with Data-Driven Marketing

At SRSG Consulting, we offer a full suite of digital marketing services designed to enhance your online presence, attract your target audience, and drive business growth. With our expertise in data-driven strategies and creative marketing solutions, we help you achieve your marketing goals effectively and efficiently.

With our support, your business can focus on growth while we take care of compliance and employee welfare needs.

Why Choose SRSG Consulting for Digital Marketing?

The digital world is full of opportunities, and we’re here to help you make the most of them. Whether you want to improve your search rankings, grow your social media presence, or launch a targeted ad campaign, SRSG Consulting has you covered.

  • Customized Strategies: We tailor our solutions to meet the specific needs and goals of your business.
  • Data-Driven Approach: Our decisions are backed by data and insights to ensure maximum ROI.
  • Experienced Team: Our team of digital marketing experts stays updated with the latest industry trends and tools.
  • End-to-End Services: From strategy to execution and analysis, we offer complete digital marketing solutions.
  • Proven Results: We focus on delivering tangible results that help your business grow.

Our Digital Marketing Services Include:

1. Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
  • We employ proven SEO strategies to help your business rank higher on search engines, ensuring your audience finds you when it matters most. Our SEO services include:
  • Keyword research and optimization
  • On-page and off-page SEO
  • Technical SEO audits
  • Local SEO for region-specific growth
2. Pay-Per-Click Advertising (PPC)
  • We create and manage highly targeted PPC campaigns that deliver measurable results. Whether it’s Google Ads or social media ads, our approach ensures you reach the right audience at the right time. Services include:
  • Campaign strategy and setup
  • Ad copy creation and optimization
  • Performance tracking and reporting
  • Conversion rate optimization (CRO)
3. Social Media Marketing
  • Our social media marketing strategies help you build meaningful relationships with your audience while increasing brand awareness. We offer:
  • Content planning and creation
  • Platform-specific strategy (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)
  • Paid social media advertising
  • Community management and engagement
4. Content Marketing
  • Content is at the heart of every successful marketing strategy. We create high-quality content that informs, engages, and converts your audience into loyal customers. Our services include:
  • Blog and article writing
  • Website content optimization
  • Infographic and video content creation
  • Email marketing campaigns
5. Email Marketing
  • Email marketing remains one of the most effective ways to nurture leads and drive conversions. Our email marketing services include:
  • Strategy development
  • Email design and automation
  • Personalized campaign execution
  • Performance analysis and optimization
6. Web Analytics and Reporting
  • We believe in the power of data. Our web analytics services help you understand your audience's behavior and refine your marketing strategies for better results. We offer:
  • Google Analytics setup and integration
  • Conversion tracking and analysis
  • Custom performance dashboards
  • Regular performance reporting
Contact Us

Ready to take your business to the next level with digital marketing? Contact us today for a free consultation and discover how our solutions can help you achieve your business goals.

  • Email: contact@srsgconsulting.com
  • Phone: +91 75987 87860
  • Address: Pollachi
Book Your Free Consultation
